title: Internal fault when using clocking block

features.name: clocking block with output skew
features.description: Code should include a clocking block with an output item that uses output skew syntax (#1ns)

features.name: clocking block with input skew
features.description: Code should include a clocking block with an input item that uses input skew syntax (#1step)

features.name: clocking block with posedge event control
features.description: Code should include a clocking block that uses posedge clock event control
